textPlain: This is a great project. The blog post explaining how they reverse engineered everything is a good read, too:https://medusalix.github.io/posts/miele-interface/
what we miss is a universal control computer to control those washing machines. It is very often that part that breaks and that is "so expensive that you'd better replace the whole machine".
Time for some overclocking... 10k RPM.Stellar Work!
